case_title: LEE BLACKWELL et al VS. AMY VILLASTRIGO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLACKWELL, LEE , HUSBAND BLACKWELL, SUSAN , WIFE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLASTRIGO, AMY , WIFE VILLASTRIGO, 'JOHN DOE' , HUSBAND $6,902.26 PRINCIPAL, $96.63 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,155.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLACKWELL, LEE , HUSBAND SERVED DEC-05-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VILLASTRIGO, 'JOHN DOE' , HUSBAND PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JAN-17-2006 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
